вҳҫ

YouвҖҷre not his wife вҖ” youвҖҷre a concubine, a mere fling he brought home after you got pregnant. And even though you're not the real wife, you're the one enjoying all the privileges as if you were. Does that mean, sitting next to him during a celebratory banquet while his wife glares at you? Yes
